items.title: [Steam论坛] Network busy
items.summary: When launching the game it starts to download something, stops at what it thinks is 3-6% and then a message "network busy". VPN don't seem to make any difference. No chinese games for me i guess.
items.author: BECEJlA9_XYPMA
